scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,services,workers,electron "pnpm --filter @ema/renderer dev" "pnpm --filter @ema/services dev" "pnpm --filter @ema/workers dev" "pnpm dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: pnpm --filter @ema/electron build:main && wait-on tcp:1420 tcp:4488 && cross-env EMA_MANAGED_RUNTIME=external pnpm --filter @ema/electron start
